title: LIP01 - Lead avatar
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
  <gds-card variant="neutral-02-outlined">
    <gds-list dividers="">
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01 dividers>
        <gds-avatar slot="lead" size="m" shape="circular">AA</gds-avatar>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Anna Andersson</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-s-book">Senior advicer</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
        <gds-avatar slot="lead" size="m" shape="circular">JJ</gds-avatar>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Johan Johansen</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-s-book">Client executive</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
                  <gds-avatar slot="lead" size="m" shape="circular">KS</gds-avatar>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Karen Smith</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-s-book">Mortgage advisor</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
                  <gds-avatar slot="lead" size="m" shape="circular">JJ</gds-avatar>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column">

        </gds-flex>
      </gds-list-item-pattern-01>

  </gds-card>
</gds-div>
